name: nunjitsu
description: A Nunjucks-compatible template engine backed by Rust and WebAssembly

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:wasm && npm run build:typescript && node scripts/finalize-build.mjs
scripts.build:typescript: tsgo -p tsconfig.esm.json && tsgo -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node scripts/build-cjs.mjs
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:rust && npm run test:source && npm run test:benchmark && npm run test:package
scripts.test:package: npm run build && node --test tests/package/esm.test.mjs tests/package/commonjs.test.cjs
scripts.test:source: npm run build:wasm && node --test tests/source/runtime.test.ts tests/source/compat.test.ts
